series_metadata.series_description: This record series is mandated by O.A.C. 4167-6-01 and requires employers to be compliant with PERRP specified records retention requirements. This schedule is inclusive of the Log, Reports, and the Summary of work related injuries and illnesses.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain the Log, reports, and Summary for five years following the year to which they pertain, then delete/shred. ; Electronic: Retain the Log and Summary for five years following the year to which they pertain, then delete/shred., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
